# QC-03: Design Completeness & Standards

**Track:** Quality Controls (`QC`) · **Priority:** MUST (mandatory) · **Status:** draft

Validate that the proposed design addresses all requirements from the Stage 1 specification, follows organisational architectural patterns, meets technology standards, and is sufficiently detailed for implementation.

## Required In Stages

| Stage | Name | Applicability |
|-------|------|---------------|
| 2 | System Design | Mandatory |

## Delegation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Pattern** | Agent assists, human approves |
| **Agent does** | Validate design coverage against specification; flag gaps, pattern deviations, and standards violations. |
| **Human does** | Review validation report; approve design or request revisions before sign-off. |

## Inputs

| Artifact | Source Control | Description |
|----------|---------------|-------------|
| Validated feature specification | QC-01 | Complete specification from Stage 1 used to validate design coverage. |


## Outputs

| Artifact | Type | Description | Retention |
|----------|------|-------------|-----------|
| Design validation report | evidence | Structured report confirming all requirements are addressed and all standards are met. | 7 years (DORA) |
| Approved architecture document | artefact | Final approved design including component diagrams, integration maps, and data flows. | Lifecycle of system + 7 years |


## Automation

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **Frequency** | per_change |
| **SLA** | — |
| **Tooling** | — |

## Failure Behaviour

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| **On failure** | block |
| **Escalate to** | Lead Architect |

Design is returned for revision. Stage 2 cannot progress until all gaps are resolved.

## Dependencies

- `QC-01`
- `QC-02`


## Regulatory Mapping

| Regulation | Article | Obligation |
|------------|---------|------------|
| DORA | Art. 8(4) | ICT systems must be designed to ensure resilience and meet quality standards |


## Ownership

**Owner team:** Engineering · **Owner role:** Lead Architect
